title: Epigeneium triflorum
taxonomy: Epigeneium triflorum is classified as a genus of orchids within the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Aeridinae, which is a subfamily of orchids that are mostly terrestrial and have a tropical or subtropical distribution. The genus Epigeneium is further divided into several species, with Epigeneium triflorum being one of the species within this genus. Epigeneium triflorum is native to the Himalayan region and is characterized by its unique three-flowered inflorescence. The classification of Epigeneium triflorum reflects its evolutionary relationships and characteristics within the plant kingdom.
